rawAssistant: Roads can be treacherous, especially in the mist. Before you head out, make sure those lanterns are securely tied down; we've seen them blown loose by stronger gusts than this before, and it's a hazard waiting to happen. You wouldn't want your party stumbling into darkness again, now would you?
